commands.author: BunsDev

target.title: fix(control-ui): add guarded dashboard shortcuts
target.body:
## Summary
- Refreshes PR #84827 onto current `origin/main` and resolves the stale merge conflicts for #81946.
- Adds a centralized guarded Control UI dashboard shortcut dispatcher for `/`, `N`, `Esc`, and the existing Cmd/Ctrl+K palette shortcut.
- Reuses existing app actions: `/` switches to Chat and focuses the composer, `N` calls the same New messages scroll path, and `Esc` dismisses transient dashboard UI in priority order.
- Keeps dashboard shortcuts out of inputs, textareas, selects, contenteditable regions, `role=textbox` controls, and common embedded editor roots.
- Adds visible `N` discoverability on the New messages affordance, focused regression coverage, and a short Control UI docs note.

Fixes #81946.
Refs closed prior implementation attempt #81958.

## Refresh notes
- Dropped the normal-PR `CHANGELOG.md` entry from the previous branch.
- Dropped unrelated `docs/install/installer.md` table formatting from the previous branch.
- Regenerated Control UI locale bundles and `.i18n` metadata with `pnpm ui:i18n:sync`; generated locale output was not hand-merged.
- Preserved current-main chat session picker/mobile-controls behavior; `Esc` now closes the session picker before the mobile controls wrapper.

## Duplicate / related work review
- Current `origin/main` still only had the Cmd/Ctrl+K palette handler and click-only New messages button before this refresh, so #81946 was not resolved on main.
- #81958 implemented similar shortcut behavior but is closed stale-unmerged, so it is source context rather than an active superseding PR.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Control UI dashboard shortcuts now support `/` composer focus, `N` new-message jump, and `Esc` transient dismissal through one guarded dispatcher while preserving editable-field behavior and the existing Cmd/Ctrl+K command-palette shortcut.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on Node 24/pnpm after rebasing onto `origin/main` at `f7c32fc8befda7e8e4ef6dbf2c1ec823ff68a3bb`; delegated Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kspemnma51480h6q2bcwjwa3` for changed-gate proof.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/navigation.browser.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/web/control-ui.md ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts ui/src/styles/chat/layout.css ui/src/ui/app-keyboard-shortcuts.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/navigation.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts`
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "env CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=6 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 pnpm check:changed"`
- On pristine `origin/main`: `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test-origin-main-proof.tsbuildinfo`

Evidence after fix:
- `ui/src/ui/navigation.browser.test.ts`: passed, 18 tests.
- `ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`: passed, 59 tests.
- `oxfmt --check`: passed.
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check`: clean for all 18 generated locales, with 3 fallback keys each for the new New messages copy.
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- `git merge-tree --write-tree origin/main HEAD`: succeeded, so the refreshed head is conflict-free against current main.
- Testbox changed gate `tbx_01kspemnma51480h6q2bcwjwa3` reached `pnpm check:changed` but failed in `typecheck core tests` on untouched `src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts` TS2339 diagnostics. Running the same core-test typecheck on pristine `origin/main` reproduced the same diagnostics, so this is an existing main blocker outside this PR diff.

Observed result after fix: Regression tests cover `/` switching to Chat and focusing the composer, `N` calling `scrollToBottom()` only when the new-message state is active, editable targets no-oping for printable dashboard shortcuts, Cmd/Ctrl+K still opening the command palette from editable targets, `Esc` dismissing session picker before mobile controls and then other transient state, and the New messages button retaining its click path while exposing the `N` shortcut.

What was not tested: A fully green Testbox `pnpm check:changed` result is still blocked by the current-main `src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts` type error reproduced above; no manual browser smoke/video was recorded beyond automated browser/unit coverage.
